mismatches: auth.ts/register: FE LoginResult type has 'email?: string' but BE LoginResultDTO has NO 'email' field — FE expects a field the backend never returns.
auth.ts/getProfile: FE UserProfile has 'experience' but BE UserProfileDTO has 'points' — field name mismatch.
auth.ts/getProfile: FE UserProfile has 'avatar?' but BE UserProfileDTO has 'avatarUrl' — field name mismatch.
word.ts/getWordbooks: FE WordbookDTO has 'official' (boolean) but BE WordbookDTO has 'isOfficial' — Jackson serializes as 'isOfficial', not 'official'.
chat.ts/sendMessage: FE SendMessageResponse expects single 'message: MessageDTO' but BE returns 'userMessage' AND 'aiMessage' (two messages).
chat.ts/sendMessage: FE SendMessageResponse has 'grammarSuggestions?: string[]' but BE returns 'grammarIssues: GrammarIssueDTO[]' — field name AND type mismatch (strings vs objects).
chat.ts/getMessages: FE MessageDTO has 'sessionId' but BE MessageDTO has NO 'sessionId' field.

chat.ts: FE GrammarIssue has fields {start, end, original, suggestion, explanation} but BE GrammarIssueDTO has {error, correction, explanation} — completely different field structure. Only 'explanation' matches.
writing.ts/getModels: FE ModelEssayDTO has 'comment' but BE ModelEssayDTO has 'analysis' — field name mismatch.
forum.ts/getCategories: FE ForumCategory expects 'postCount' but BE CategoryDTO has NO 'postCount' field (only has {id, name, description, icon}).
forum.ts/getPosts: FE ForumPost has 'content' but BE PostDTO returns 'summary' (post list returns summary, not full content).
forum.ts/getPosts: FE ForumPost has 'isLiked?' but BE PostDTO has NO 'isLiked' field.
forum.ts/getPostDetail: FE PostDetail has 'isLiked' but BE PostDetailDTO has NO 'isLiked' field (BE has isPinned/isEssence instead).
forum.ts/replyPost: FE types the response as 'ForumPost' but BE actually returns 'ReplyDTO' — completely wrong type.
forum.ts: FE ForumReply has 'postId' but BE ReplyDTO has NO 'postId' field.
reading.ts/getArticleTranslation: FE types response as 'string' (get<string>) but BE returns Result<ArticleDetailDTO> — wrong type entirely.
reading.ts/getArticleDetail: FE ArticleDetailDTO has 'bookmarked?' but BE ArticleDetailDTO has NO 'bookmarked' field (only the list ArticleDTO has it).
reading.ts/getSources: FE SourceDTO expects 'articleCount' but BE SourceDTO has 'activeCount' — field name mismatch.
reading.ts/toggleBookmark: FE types as post<null> but BE returns Result<Boolean> — ignores the returned boolean.
reading.ts/syncArticles: FE types as post<null> but BE returns Result<Integer> — ignores the returned count.

critical_mismatches: chat.ts/sendMessage — response structure completely different (userMessage+aiMessage vs single message, grammarIssues vs grammarSuggestions)
chat.ts GrammarIssue — completely different field structure (start/end/original/suggestion vs error/correction)
forum.ts/replyPost — wrong return type (ForumPost vs ReplyDTO)
reading.ts/getArticleTranslation — wrong return type (string vs ArticleDetailDTO)
